sections.heading: Combination Sum Calculator - Find All Number Combinations That Add Up
sections.content: Free combination sum calculator finds all unique groups of numbers that add up to your target. Supports number reuse, backtracking algorithm, Excel integration. Perfect for budget reconciliation, programming interviews & math problems.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.
